scripts.deploy: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend && npm run all
scripts.all: npm run frontend & npm run backend
scripts.install-servers: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend
scripts.install-all: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend && npm run install-backend-dev
scripts.uninstall-servers: npm run uninstall-frontend && npm run uninstall-backend
scripts.uninstall-all: npm run uninstall-frontend && npm run uninstall-backend && npm run uninstall-backend-dev
